explanation: Pendulum, Gear Train, Mainspring, and Escapement are all integral components found within a traditional mechanical clock mechanism. A Battery, however, is used to power electronic or quartz clocks, not mechanical ones.

category: Leaders Who Held De Facto Supreme Power
explanation: Julius Caesar (Dictator), Oliver Cromwell (Lord Protector), Deng Xiaoping (Paramount Leader), and Otto von Bismarck (Chancellor) all held supreme executive power in their respective states without formally being a crowned monarch or an elected head of state (like a President or Emperor). Queen Victoria, however, was a reigning, crowned monarch.
All tokens except 'Banana' are palindromes, meaning they read the same forwards and backwards.
